summary: Herdr is a terminal multiplexer designed to manage multiple coding agents in a single terminal environment, providing real-time visibility into their states. It allows users to run agents anywhere, maintain persistent sessions, and interact with them seamlessly over SSH without the overhead of a graphical interface.
use_cases: Monitoring the status of multiple coding agents during development
Managing remote coding sessions on a VPS
Integrating various AI coding assistants for collaborative coding tasks
